item.title: [SYD2][Infrastructure ] - Room S2-5X-02 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 29, 21:00 UTC  -  Jul 30, 07:00 UTC

May 19, 15:33 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 29/07/2026 21:00 UTC
End time : 30/07/2026 07:00 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance window, Some devices in the room S2-5X-02 will temporarily lose power redundancy. Single-powered devices connected may experience a brief power interruption while they are migrated to other power source.

Public network will be unavailable for approximately 30–45 minutes for the racks specified below :
S2-5X-02-05A
S2-5X-02-05B
S2-5X-02-08B
S2-5X-02-09B

IPMI (Intelligent Platform Management Interface) will be unavailable during the maintenance window for the racks specified bellow :
S2-5X-02-06B
S2-5X-02-07A
S2-5X-02-07B
S2-5X-02-08B
S2-5X-02-09B
S2-5X-02-10A

Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing an electrical maintenance.

Thank you for your understanding.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [WAW1][Infrastructure] - Room W16 Electrical Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 16, 06:00 - 14:00 UTC

Jun 9, 15:55 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Electrical Infrastructure in the Room W16.

Start time : 16/06/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 16/06/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in the specified racks listed below may experience temporary IPMI unavailability during the operation, for a period of five minutes per rack:
W16A01, W16A02, W16A03, W16B01, W16B02, W16B03, W16A04, W16A05, W16A06, W16B04, W16B05, W16B06, W16A07, W16A08, W16A09, W16B07, W16B08, W16B09, W16A10, W16A11, W16A12, W16B10, W16B11, W16B12, W16A13, W16A14, W16A15, W16B13, W16B14, W16B15, W16A16, W16A17, W16A18, W16B16, W16B17, W16B18, W16A19, W16A20, W16A21 and W16B19.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing an electrical maintenance in Room W16.

Thank you for your understanding.
